(35)
frightened by elephants. (36) cowardly in fight, (37) always
timid. (38) lies incognito. (39) giver of food, (40) falls into the
fire. (41) oppressed by hunger, (42) eats food, (43) wanders aim-
lessly, (44) flesh-earer, (45) wounded by weapons, (46) married,
(47) holds a ball in his hand. (48) plays at dice, (49) becomes a
king. (50) distressed, (51) lies on his bed, (52) one that is served
by his enemies, (53) accompanied by friends, (54) a Yogin,
(55) in the company of his wife, (56) eats sumptuously, (57)
drinks milk. (58) performs meritorious acts, (59) healthy or self-
possessed, and (60) lives happily.
Candravastha There are 12 Avasthas or conditions of the
Moon. As in the case of the Candrakriya, you have to find out

48 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
the total duration of the star as well as its elapsed part in Ghalis.
Divide the total duration by 12. The quotient you get is the
value of one Avaslha. If the total duration be 60 Ghatis, that of
60
